profile: The candidate is an experienced Commercial Manager based in Dublin, Ireland with 3+ years of relevant experience. Experience spans data centre and commercial environments. Recent project exposure includes Commercial lead with mission-critical delivery experience across hyperscale data centre packages, procurement, and change control. Key strengths include Commercial management, Procurement strategy, Change control, and Final accounts. Qualifications include BSc Quantity Surveying and MRICS (in progress).
relevantProjects: Commercial lead with mission-critical delivery experience across hyperscale data centre packages, procurement, and change control.
Managed MEP and CSA package procurement, variations, and reporting on data centre builds.
Supported pre-construction cost planning and live package change management.
Leads commercial delivery for hyperscale projects in Ireland and mainland Europe.
